attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SMGA.CLAIM_GAINING_AGENT_KEY,
SXGA.GN_AGENT_ID AS SK_CLAIM_GAINING_AGENT_ID,
NCLM.CLAIM_KEY AS CLAIM_KEY,
SXGA.GAINING_NODE_ID AS BK_CLAIM_GAINING_NODE_ID_INT,
SXGA.GAINING_SALESREP_NUMBER AS BK_SALES_REP_NUM,
SXGA.SPLIT_PERCENT AS SPLIT_PCT,
COALESCE(SALES_REP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS,'UNKNOWN') AS CLAIM_GAINING_AGENT_EMAIL_TXT, 
SALTERR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,             
SXGA.CREATION_DATE AS CREATE_DTM,
SXGA.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
COALESCE(CRCD_BY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(UPTD_BY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS LST_UPTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE

FROM
$$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_GAINING_AGENT SXGA

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_CLAIM_GAINING_AGENT SMGA
ON SXGA.GN_AGENT_ID=SMGA.SK_CLAIM_GAINING_AGENT_ID

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM NCLM
ON SXGA.CLAIM_ID=NCLM.SK_CLAIM_ID

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALTERR  
ON SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT=SXGA.GAINING_NODE_ID

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP SALES_REP
ON SALES_REP.SALES_REP_NUM=SXGA.GAINING_SALESREP_NUMBER

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER CRCD_BY
  ON CRCD_BY.USER_ID = SXGA.CREATED_BY 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER UPTD_BY
  ON UPTD_BY.USER_ID = SXGA.LAST_UPDATED_BY

SELECT
GAIN_AGENT.GN_AGENT_ID                   
,GAIN_AGENT.GAINING_NODE_ID               
,GAIN_AGENT.GAINING_SALESREP_NUMBER       
,GAIN_AGENT.SPLIT_PERCENT                 
,GAIN_AGENT.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER         
,GAIN_AGENT.CREATED_BY                    
,GAIN_AGENT.CREATION_DATE                 
,GAIN_AGENT.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,GAIN_AGENT.LAST_UPDATED_DATE             
,GAIN_AGENT.CLAIM_ID                      
,GAIN_AGENT.NODE_ID_LEVEL_1               
,GAIN_AGENT.NODE_ID_LEVEL_2               
,GAIN_AGENT.NODE_ID_LEVEL_3               
,GAIN_AGENT.NODE_ID_LEVEL_4               
,GAIN_AGENT.NODE_ID_LEVEL_5               
,GAIN_AGENT.NODE_ID_LEVEL_6               
,GAIN_AGENT.NODE_ID_LEVEL_7               
,GAIN_AGENT.NODE_ID_LEVEL_8               
,GAIN_AGENT.NODE_ID_LEVEL_9               
,GAIN_AGENT.NODE_ID_LEVEL_10              
,GAIN_AGENT.NODE_ID_LEVEL_11                                          
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_XXNCE_GAINING_AGENT GAIN_AGENT
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CLAIM NCLM
WHERE GAIN_AGENT.CLAIM_ID=NCLM.SK_CLAIM_ID )
OR NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP SALES_REP
WHERE COALESCE(GAIN_AGENT.GAINING_SALESREP_NUMBER,-999)=SALES_REP.SALES_REP_NUM )
OR NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALTERR  
WHERE COALESCE(GAIN_AGENT.GAINING_NODE_ID,-999)=SALTERR.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER CRCD_BY
WHERE CRCD_BY.USER_ID = CASE WHEN GAIN_AGENT.CREATED_BY IS NULL THEN -999 
									WHEN GAIN_AGENT.CREATED_BY=999 THEN -999 
									ELSE GAIN_AGENT.CREATED_BY END)
OR NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CLM_FND_USER UPTD_BY
WHERE UPTD_BY.USER_ID = CASE WHEN GAIN_AGENT.LAST_UPDATED_BY IS NULL THEN -999 
									WHEN GAIN_AGENT.LAST_UPDATED_BY=999 THEN -999 
									ELSE GAIN_AGENT.LAST_UPDATED_BY END)
